summary: Intelligence Pipeline Phase 1 (School Insight + Timeline agents) - All 20 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend E2E testing PASSED - Intelligence cards render correctly on Journey page, load-on-demand works, confidence badges display, expand/collapse works.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/intelligence/program/{program_id}/school-insight returns card with strengths, concerns, unknowns
VERIFIED: GET /api/intelligence/program/{program_id}/timeline returns card with timeline_label, timeline_color, next_action
VERIFIED: Both endpoints return confidence badge (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) with percentage
VERIFIED: Confidence calculation: HIGH >=70%, MEDIUM 40-69%, LOW <40%
VERIFIED: Both endpoints cache results in MongoDB intelligence_cache collection (24h TTL)
VERIFIED: Force refresh works with ?force=true parameter (from_cache=false)
VERIFIED: Cache returns from_cache=true on subsequent calls
VERIFIED: School Insight uses LLM when confidence >= MEDIUM, deterministic fallback when LOW
VERIFIED: Timeline is deterministic, LLM-enhanced narrative when 5+ interactions
VERIFIED: School insight strengths/concerns include source-cited evidence
VERIFIED: Timeline shows urgency field (normal/medium/high) and urgency_note
VERIFIED: Endpoints return 404 'No athlete profile found' for users without athlete profile (admin test)
VERIFIED: Payload builder tracks 12 field groups for confidence calculation
VERIFIED: Intelligence section renders on Journey page in sidebar
VERIFIED: Cards are clickable and trigger load-on-demand (not auto-loaded)
VERIFIED: Cards expand/collapse on click after loading
VERIFIED: Confidence badge visible with HIGH (100%) for Emma Chen + UF
VERIFIED: Emma Chen has Pro plan - full cards visible (not locked)
VERIFIED: Real LLM calls via Emergent Key (gpt-5.2) - not mocked
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Emma Chen data with 21+ interactions with University of Florida
context_for_next_testing_agent: Intelligence Pipeline Phase 1 complete. School Insight and Timeline endpoints tested at /api/intelligence/program/{program_id}/school-insight and /api/intelligence/program/{program_id}/timeline. Both use payload_builder.py for data assembly with 12h cache and confidence calculation. Results cached in MongoDB intelligence_cache collection for 24h. Emma Chen with Pro plan sees full cards on Journey page. LLM calls use Emergent Key with gpt-5.2 model. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_intelligence_pipeline.py
